sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31039" key="ei)lami/des" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰλαμίδες</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, <sense id="n31039.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">membranes</tr_> of the brain or spinal cord, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.44</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
